feature.name: Jinja2 filters and tests core
feature.description: Extract Jinja2 built-in filters, tests, and template usage via Environment.
included_behaviors: apply built-in filters in templates and via call_filter
evaluate built-in tests in templates and via call_test
support common filters: capitalize, default, length, join, map, select
support common tests: defined, undefined, even, odd, number, string
default filter honors boolean true to treat falsey values as missing
runtime Undefined and filters/tests registries must be available for call_filter/call_test
excluded_behaviors: loaders and template inheritance beyond from_string
CLI, original tests, docs, packaging metadata

entanglement.description: Filters/tests registry integrates with Environment, runtime Undefined, and template compilation.
signals: filters depend on runtime Undefined and MarkupSafe

output.import: from featurelifted import Environment, filters, tests; from featurelifted.runtime import Undefined
